description: Full success: build passes + 2 vitest tests pass. App is working. Termination condition met.

asi.hypothesis: Fix eslint version + add @tailwindcss/postcss to fix build, then add vitest tests

description: Phase 2 baseline: 2 passing tests, build passes. Starting feature development loop.

asi.hypothesis: Establishing Phase 2 baseline — no code changes
asi.next_action: Add dues data model and display component with tests

description: Add dues data layer (lib/dues.ts), DuesList component, and 13 new tests. Home page now shows real dashboard. 15 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Adding a data model + component + tests increases test count and builds real dashboard functionality
asi.next_action: Add more dashboard features — filtering, sorting, or CRUD forms

description: Add DuesFilter component with status tabs (All/Pending/Overdue/Paid) and 4 tests. Home page now interactive with client-side filtering. 19 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Status filtering tabs make the dashboard interactive and testable
asi.next_action: Add new dues form with validation + tests

description: Add DuesForm with validation (name, amount, due date) and 5 tests. Form clears after submission, validates on empty, clears errors on input. 24 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: A form with validation makes the dashboard functional for adding new dues
asi.next_action: Integrate DuesForm into home page and wire up addDues + markAsPaid in the UI

description: Wire DuesForm into home page with toggle, add Mark Paid button to DuesList with onMarkPaid callback. 4 new tests for mark paid behavior. 28 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Interactive features (add form, mark paid) make the dashboard fully functional
asi.next_action: Explore adding sorting by columns or MongoDB persistence layer

description: Add column sorting to DuesList (name, amount, dueDate, status) with ascending/descending toggle. 6 new tests for sort indicators, order, and direction toggle. 34 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Column sorting makes the dashboard more usable and is highly testable
asi.next_action: Search filter by name or MongoDB persistence

description: Add DuesSearch component with name-based filtering and 3 tests. Search filters by name (case-insensitive), works alongside status filter. 37 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Name search makes the dashboard more usable for finding specific entries
asi.next_action: Add delete functionality or try MongoDB persistence

description: Add deleteDues function, delete button in DuesList, and 4 new tests. Full CRUD now supported (create, read, update via markPaid, delete). 41 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Delete completes the CRUD operations for a fully functional dashboard
asi.next_action: Add edit dues entry feature or MongoDB persistence

description: Add edit functionality: updateDues function, DuesForm edit mode with initialData, Edit button in DuesList. 8 new tests (edit form prefill, save, edit button in table). 49 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Edit completes the CRUD operations and makes the dashboard fully functional
asi.build_fixed_because: Missing getDuesById import in page.tsx caused type error
asi.next_action: Consider MongoDB persistence or data export feature

description: Add localStorage persistence: data survives page refresh, saves after add/update/delete. 4 new tests for persistence behavior. 53 total tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: localStorage persistence makes data survive page refresh without MongoDB complexity
asi.next_action: Consider wrapping up or adding data export feature
